records.content_snippet:
budgets:
  daily_limit_usd: 10.00
  hourly_limit_usd: 3.00

  alert_thresholds_percent:
    - 50
    - 80
    - 100

  per_agent_daily_limit_usd:
    planner: 1.00
    researcher: 3.00
    creator: 2.00
    visual: 2.00
    critic: 1.00
    memory_agent: 0.50
    executor: 0.50
    watchdog: 0.10
    auditor: 0.50
    interacter: 0.50
    reporter: 0.50

  per_task_limit_usd: 2.00
  on_100_percent_reached: stop_cloud_calls
